steps.prompt: Press the UP arrow to move your object UP!
steps.feedback: Up it goes! Higher and higher.

steps.prompt: Now press DOWN — send it down!
LEFT now — move it to the left!
And RIGHT — move it to the right!
steps.feedback: Right! Up, down, left, right — you know all four directions!

steps.prompt: Now drag it with your finger — move it wherever you like!
steps.feedback: You moved it! You can put things exactly where you want them.
